spec_match.rationale: Six gates match the spec: secure context, COI, isolated-app://, ControlledFrame constructor, custom element, permissions-policy. Comprehensive.

interactive.rationale: Auto-runs on load and renders the relevant controlled-frame gate checklist plus a verdict. The unrelated generated live-probe panel was removed on 2026-06-04, so this needs chrome-devtools-mcp re-review before the score is treated as current.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Blurb promises six gates with verdict; the primary panel delivers that.

edge_cases.rationale: Covers each gate individually; doesn't show the diagnostic order (which gate to fix first). A visitor with 2/6 doesn't know which to address — secure context is upstream of crossOriginIsolated, etc.

references.rationale: Includes the correct chromestatus.com/feature/5199572022853632 link in see-also.

design_system.rationale: Variables only, no raw hex, .yes/.no states use accent-emerald and accent-rose.

openQuestions.title: Re-review after generic probe removal
openQuestions.detail: The unrelated generated live-probe controls were removed on 2026-06-04. Use chrome-devtools-mcp to re-test the remaining concept UI; if the page is now static or lacks a feature-specific observable behavior, add a real control, readout, server-backed route, or exact feature probe rather than restoring the generic panel.

openQuestions.title: Recommend a fix order
openQuestions.detail: When N of 6 gates fail, surface the upstream-first recommendation: 'Fix isSecureContext before crossOriginIsolated before isolated-app://.' Make it an ordered list so visitors don't chase the wrong gate.

summary: Solid gate-by-gate diagnostic with the unrelated generated live-probe panel removed on 2026-06-04. Add clearer fix-order guidance, and re-review in chrome-devtools-mcp before treating the interactivity score as current.
